training_methodology.notes: prompts/plan-generation/methodology.md — GROUND TRUTH. Periodization rules, exercise selection philosophy. Created in Session 1 (2026-02-08).

plan_system_prompt.notes: prompts/plan-generation/system-prompt.md + exercise-selection.md + injury-protocols.md. Created in Session 1 (2026-02-08).

plan_output_schema.notes: prompts/plan-generation/output-schema.json. UPGRADED to v3.1 (2026-03-01): 6-block A-F structure, validation_checks, warm_ups, deload_protocol, readiness_assessment, weekly_progression, substitutions per exercise.

plan_constraint_files.notes: v3.1 addition (2026-03-01). 5 new files: block-taxonomy.md, plan-generation-constraints.md, exercise-bank-schema.json, progression-rules.json. Provides structured data and hard validation rules for AI plan generation.

plan_few_shot_examples.notes: prompts/plan-generation/examples/. 3 examples created (2026-03-16): (1) commercial gym intermediate no injury — baseline all 6 blocks, (2) home gym beginner lower back — equipment + injury adaptations, (3) advanced anterior shoulder impingement — pressing substitutions. README.md explains injection pattern for Edge Function.

coach_personality.notes: prompts/coach-chat/personality.md — GROUND TRUTH for coach voice. Created 2026-03-15. Direct but warm, evidence-based, adaptive by context. 6 non-negotiable character rules (no filler openers/closers, always specific, never guilt-trip). Includes tone by situation table and language style guide.

coach_system_prompt.notes: prompts/coach-chat/system-prompt.md + boundaries.md. Created 2026-03-15. Full 6-block methodology embedded in system prompt. Boundaries: can do (training, recovery principles, general nutrition, injury management), cannot do (diagnose, prescribe, create meal plans, write new training plans). Grey-area handling table included. Model: claude-sonnet-4-20250514, max_tokens=2048.

coach_checkin_templates.notes: prompts/coach-chat/check-in-templates/weekly-checkin.md. Created 2026-03-15. Main weekly template + 3 variants: missed sessions, deload week reminder, phase transition. Includes example output for testing.

test_personas.notes: tests/personas/. 8 personas exist: beginner-knee-injury-home-gym, advanced-martial-artist-full-gym, senior-multiple-injuries-minimal-equip, advanced-lifter-plateau, desk-worker-knee-pain, martial-artist-shoulder, postpartum-return, senior-beginner. Target of 8+ met.

plan_validation_tests.notes: tests/plan-validation.ts. Automated safety checks on generated plans.

coach_behavior_tests.notes: tests/coach-behavior.ts. Coach stays in character, within boundaries.

output_schema_v3_1.name: plan-generation-output-schema.json
output_schema_v3_1.breaking_changes: Blocks expanded from A-D to A-F. validation_checks object added to plan_metadata. warm_ups, deload_protocol, readiness_assessment now required top-level fields.
output_schema_v3_1.notes: Backend generate-plan Edge Function updated to v3.1 (2026-03-15, deployed as version 4, ACTIVE). Fully handles 6 blocks, session templates, nested exercises, exercise_bank_ref, deload halving.
